title: rubus × complanatus
intro: Rubus × complanatus, also known as the hybrid blackberry, is a cross between the European blackberry (Rubus fruticosus) and the dewberry (Rubus argutus). The medicinal properties of Rubus × complanatus include its high antioxidant content, which helps to protect against cell damage and inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × complanatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Rubus × complanatus can be made into teas, jams, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
